title: The Forgotten Forest
description: The official modpack of the Forgotten Forest's Minecraft Server.
body:
A modpack custom-built for the Forgotten Forest Westmarch D&D Discord Server.

Contains a variety of thematically-appropriate and challenging mods.

(Resource packs included: Faithless, [Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack), Createless)
